base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of brick_block_initial — a tile from 1985 super mario bros. Initial state of brick-block (pre-hit) — 2×2 sub-brick pattern tile. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Initial state of brick-block (pre-hit) — 2×2 sub-brick pattern tile; destructible by Big Mario from below
